records.growth: Name the separate roles inside the concentration instead of treating them as one undifferentiated force.
records.summary: A stellium is a structural concentration of three or more chart points in one sign. Symbolically, it marks repeated emphasis whose different functions may need coordination; it does not guarantee that one theme controls a life.
records.title: Stellium

records.growth: Use the apex as a place to practice a specific response while continuing to hear both ends of the polarity.
records.summary: A T-square is a structural pattern in which two opposing chart points each form a square to a third, or apex, point. Its symbolism emphasizes a recurring field of negotiation and action, not an inescapable conflict or forecast.
records.title: T-Square

records.growth: Give the easy circulation a concrete task so familiarity develops into a practiced capacity.
records.summary: A grand trine is a structural circuit of three chart points joined pairwise by trines. It is traditionally read as mutually reinforcing flow that becomes most useful through deliberate practice, not as proof of effortless talent or luck.
records.title: Grand Trine
